name: outliner
description: Shared hierarchical text outliner. Each item is an $outline_item < $note tree node with .parent / .position / .hidden; the outliner is an $outliner < $space that scopes items and tracks per-actor focus + single-level undo. UI is minimal: enter/leave, collapse/expand, drag-reorder, drag-drop reparent, hidden checkbox, undo button, and embedded minichat. Chat carries 'add' / 'hide <item>' / 'focus [<item>]' commands. Items are not portable: they cannot be carried; removal recycles, with children re-attached to the removed item's former parent.

classes.description: One node in an outliner tree. Holds the inherited $note text/name/description/writers shape plus its own .parent (objref of containing item or null = top-level), .position (1-indexed sibling rank; siblings carry a dense 1..N), and .hidden (per-item flag). NOT portable: cannot be taken into actor inventory or moved anywhere that isn't an $outliner or $nowhere. Removal recycles; the :recycle handler detaches from the outliner so children remain parented at the former parent.

verbs.name: moveto
recycle
set_hidden
set_position
set_parent

classes.description: Shared hierarchical text outliner: a $space that scopes a tree of $outline_item children. Tree shape (parent / position / hidden) lives on the items themselves; the outliner stores only visit-scoped per-actor maps for focus and single-level undo, plus the standard $space presence. Chat commands: 'add <text>' (creates a new item under caller's focus), 'hide <item>' (sets the hidden flag), 'focus [<item>]' (sets per-actor focus, null = root).

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { return this.name + " (outliner)"; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { let view = this:look_self(); observe({ type: "looked", actor: actor, to: actor, room: location(this), target: this, text: view["summary"], look: view, ts: now() }); return view; }

verbs.name: look_self
room_roster
verbs.source: verb :room_roster() rxd { let rows = []; for item in present_actors(this) { if (isa(item, $actor)) { let idle = idle_seconds(item); let row = { id: item, name: item.name, presence: presence_status(item) }; if (idle != null) { row["idle_seconds"] = idle; } rows = rows + [row]; } } return rows; }

verbs.name: live_audience
verbs.source: verb :live_audience(observation) rxd { let out = []; for row in this.session_subscribers { if (typeof(row) == "map" && has(row, "session")) { out = out + [row["session"]]; } } return out; }

verbs.name: enter
leave
out
verbs.source: verb :out() rxd { return this:leave(); }

verbs.name: acceptable
verbs.source: verb :acceptable(object) rxd { return isa(object, $outline_item) || isa(object, $actor); }

verbs.name: enterfunc
exitfunc
list_items
_siblings_ordered
_renumber_siblings
_detach_item
_set_undo
_restore_item
add_item
set_item_text
move_item
reorder_item
hide
hide_command
remove_item
eject_item
_capture_item
undo
focus_on
focus_command
focus_root_command
verbs.source: verb :focus_root_command() rx { return this:focus_on(null); }

verbs.name: add
